text:
Market today: Tech is still the driver, but sentiment is shaky. Tariffs and chip supply fears are the main headwinds.

Your holdings: SOXL is down a brutal -38.11% and is a SELL. SPAL is also down over -50% and is a SELL. SPY and QQQ/QQQI are also flagged SELL/TRIM. CRWD and SMH are HOLD but SMH is down -8.83%.

Watch: Keep an eye on NVDA and AVGO from the scanner, especially if they hit their 'discount' entries.

Bottom line: You're heavily concentrated and leveraged in a shaky sector. Focus on managing your risk.
plays: Trim SPY: It's flagged SELL. Respect the 705 stop.
Trim QQQ: It's flagged TRIM. Consider tightening the 670 stop.
No new buys today - hold and watch
